/CAL:MODIFICATION OF SENTENCE PER ORDER OF THE COURT OF APPEAL, FIRST APPELLATE DISTRICT, DIVISION 5, FILED 11-29-2017/NUNCDAT:04-01-16/AJW/DNACOMP//DEF:WAIVES HIS RIGHT TO A JURY TRIAL ON THE OUTSTANDING CHARGE/DEF:ADMITSA PRIOR FELONY CONVICTION PURSUANT TO HS 11352(A)/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS RESENTENCED ON THE ORIGINAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS WITH THE FOLLOWING EXCEPTIONS:THE ENHANCEMENT ALLEGATION PURSUANT TO HS 11370,2(A) IS STRICKEN, IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE/CTORD:IF STRIKING THE ENHANCEMENT ALLEGATION PURSUANT TO HS 11370,2(A) IS NOT AVAILABLE DUE TO ITS RECENT AMENDMENT, THEN THE COURT ORDERS THE ALLEGATION STRICKEN PURSUANT TO ESTRADA/CTORD: THE BOOKING FEE AND PSR FEE STRICKEN/

/CAL:DA MTR MANDATORY SUPERVISION/X: LAW CLERK, SAMANTHA PERSUAD, UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF DA TANISHA GOOCH/PD/CTORD: MANDATORY SUPERVISION ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/SHER/NB/CONTD: TO SET DA MTR MANDATORY SUPERVISION/DOP/
